localization.name: Lightning Blades
localization.description:
300% damage to 1 enemy, and a random enemy is Stunned for 50TU. This attack ignores damage reduction effects, skin passive skills and the Counter Stance status effect. Then the user becomes Enraged. This unit will immediately get the next turn if this is the first time this skill has been used while on the battlefield or if this unit has used any other active skill since this skill was last used.

An Enraged unit's attack is increased to 1.5x until the end of their next turn. Enrage will overwrite any existing Weak or Enrage effects on the user.
localization.selected: 300% damage to 1 enemy & may act again

localization.name: Divine Storms
localization.description:
Allies gain 1 Spirit, then ally Spirit is doubled. Enemy Spirit is halved (rounded down) then enemies lose 1 Spirit. (e.g. Enemies have 7 Spirit -> 3 then minus 1 = 2).

All allies are Purified (negative status effects like sleep, burn or poison are removed), and a random enemy is Stunned for 50TU. Unlocked each time the user damages an enemy with an attack. This skill is locked again after each use or if the user leaves the battlefield, and cannot be used for 50TU after each use.
localization.selected: Spirit Change, Allies Purified, Enemy Stunned

localization.name: Divine Lightning
localization.description:
Targets all enemies and deals 100% damage. For each target with 50+ TU, deals 400% damage to that target instead. For each target with 100+ TU, deals 600% damage to that target instead. This attack ignores damage reduction effects, skin passive skills and the Counter Stance status effect.

Then, all non-boss, non-Ephemeral enemies hit that have 1HP remaining have a 25% chance each to be immediately defeated (the user is considered to have defeated that enemy with an attack). This secondary effect ignores Revenge passive skills, Revival passive skills, and any passive skills or effects of active skills that would prevent the enemy from being defeated. Usable once each time this unit is on the battlefield.

localization.name: Call the Storm
localization.description: Pulls the user away from the battlefield to be next in line of your reinforcements. If there are no ally reinforcements, adds enough Super Denmoris to the ally team to still pull the user away to reinforcements (max 4 if the user is alone on the battlefield). Usable if the user has used Divine Lightning while on the battlefield. Usable five times per battle.
localization.selected: Sends user to be next in reinforcements

localization.name: Stormy Rain
localization.description:
Triggered when this unit enters the battlefield from the allied reinforcements:
- Stuns 2 random enemies for 100TU.
- Purifies all allies.
- Grants the ally with the lowest TU the next turn by reducing their current TU to 0.

Once this unit survives until after the end of the turn in which it enters battle, 2 random enemies with less than 150TU will be stunned for 100TU.
